objective: Prepare the codebase for BirdCLEF 2026 phase-2 work by implementing the first pseudo-labeling and submission-oriented utilities around the current AST baseline.
success_criteria: Add a utility path that can score train_soundscapes or test_soundscapes with an existing checkpoint and save raw prediction artifacts.
Add a utility path that can derive pseudo-label candidates from raw predictions using configurable score thresholds.
Keep the implementation compatible with the current run/eval manifest structure and experiment logging.
Do not hardcode one-off paths outside manifests or documented Drive conventions.
evidence_requirements: Return a diff summary and concrete reproduction commands.
If any pseudo-label artifact is produced, log the threshold policy and candidate counts.
If blocked by missing runtime dependencies or missing Colab session state, say so without inventing results.
stop_conditions: The current BirdCLEF dataset schema is insufficient to map predictions back into pseudo-label rows.
The scoring path cannot be implemented without breaking the existing evaluation path.
The requested utility would require hidden-test-only logic that cannot be validated locally.
